axon-audit.description: scrutinize axon audit boot chain registry internal references usefulness health score

compile-optimizer.description: compile optimizer scan rank candidates coverage verify test delegation audit

authoring-guide.description: Checklist and patterns for writing well-formed AXON programs

axon-compare.description: Search the web for AXON's online presence and compare it against similar agent orchestration / harness frameworks

chat-folder.description: Create or list chat folders — organize chats into projects

chat-input.description: Process a free-text user message as a continuation of the active chat goal

deps.description: Show program dependencies — what a program calls and what calls it

dev-mode.description: Toggle owner developer mode on or off (persists across sessions)

dev-new.description: Scaffold a new program from template — workspace or addon

discover.description: Find context waste — programs and tools consuming excessive context window space

explain.description: Plain-English walkthrough of any program — what it does, what it needs, what it calls

faq.description: Frequently asked questions about AXON — concepts, memory, programs, modes

find-program.description: Search installed programs by capability, keyword, or description

gain.description: Longitudinal session analytics — context savings, program usage, efficiency trends

glossary.description: AXON terminology reference — memory scopes, ops, modes, concepts

handoff.description: Serialize current session state and prepare a handoff package for another agent or model

harness-builder.description: Interactive wizard — build a structured harness for an external AI agent using AXON

help.description: Show a guide for any program — what it does, inputs, and an example

list-chats.description: Show all chats organized by folder — active chat highlighted

list-programs.description: Catalog every program across all layers with description and location

list-tools.description: Show all registered tools, their status, and what each one does

memory-compact.description: Summarize and archive old episodic memory to prevent unbounded log growth

menu.description: AXON home screen — mode switcher, context display, command entry

mode-build.description: BUILD mode — create and register new AXON programs

mode-chat.description: CHAT mode — manage conversation threads and project folders

mode-dev.description: DEV mode — kernel editing, system programs, AXON authoring (owner only)

mode-memory.description: MEMORY mode — browse what AXON knows and remembers

mode-plan.description: PLAN mode — goals and multi-step task tracking

mode-router.description: Route free-text input to the active mode's handler

mode-run.description: RUN mode — launch installed programs and add-ons

mode-system.description: SYSTEM mode — tools, output mode, session, and health

new-chat.description: Create a new chat in a folder — give it a name and a goal

open-chat.description: Resume a specific chat by name — restores its context and goal

output-layer.description: Toggle or configure the AXON output layer (confidence bar, drift indicator)

plan-add.description: Add one or more tasks to an existing plan

plan-done.description: Mark a task complete, or mark a whole plan complete

plan-list.description: Show all plans with task progress — active plans first

plan-new.description: Create a new plan with a goal and optional starting tasks

plan-view.description: Show full task list and notes for one plan

quickstart.description: 2-minute interactive tour — what AXON is, what it can do, and how to do it

register-preference.description: Save a personal preference — AXON will apply it automatically every session

register-tool.description: Guided wizard to add a new tool entry to REGISTRY.json (dev-mode required)

resume.description: Check episodic log for interrupted sessions and offer to resume the latest one

run-tests.description: Run the AXON test suite — unit, regression, integration — and display results.

session-summary.description: Generate a compact digest of what happened in a session — programs run, L: changes, drift, confidence

show-memory.description: Show everything AXON has saved across sessions — longterm facts and episodic history

show-preferences.description: Show all saved personal preferences — what AXON loads automatically each session

simulate.description: Dry-run any program without touching real state — shows what would happen

stats.description: Workspace health dashboard — programs, tools, sessions, confidence, drift, queue, cron

status.description: Snapshot of your current session — memory, game state, recent actions

switch-chat.description: Save current chat context and switch to another chat

undo.description: Roll back the L: memory changes made by the last program run

versions.description: Show version history of a program from episodic memory and file header

code-dev-explain.description: code-dev explain N: deep-dive annotated explanation of a PR for reviewers

code-dev-pr-spec.description: code-dev pr-spec N: write full implementation spec for PR-N
